comment.body: switch to a 10m/15m chart or something, watch that behavior. calculate your risk that way. If so you very well could've said huh...consolidating over the opening print now after that dip to the bottom. perhaps I'll take a 1 delta trade on futures or a call spread to capture some upside on chance we breakout over the 70 like definitively and my risk is defined for a loss if it gives up the opening print on a 5 minute close etc. Your system for entries/exits is your own. She's stated already on probabilities and having a proven/disproven view and walking away. If you went one and done and are frustrated consider your approach as she is given you probabilities not single probability. They are weighted but all have conditionals each day. There are multiple considerations provided with risk levels for reversion, etc to help you make your own choices.

comment.body:
i use csv format. there are plenty of pine indicators that would support this.  her sigma levels one do too i just am uncertain on the character limit.  i use excel formulas to generate the text string, it take maybe 1 minute or so once she has the daily posted.  excel generates two strings for me.  one for ES1! and one for SPX! based on prior day's close... here are tomorrow's for the weekly $ES1!: market must close above to maintain near-equilibrium, 6808.09, supportive cluster around, 6676.99, upside vol selling, 6866.99, centroid L, 6843.22, centroid H, 6848.97, upside pivot, 6934.52, upside target, 6993.73, downside pivot, 6770.17, downside target, 6676.72, vomma supply Low +- 20.58, 6769.74, upside vol selling +- 20.58, 6985.01, VOL H, 6935.85, VOL H+, 6964.13, VOL L, 6818.93, VOL L+, 6790.65
$SPX: market must close above to maintain near-equilibrium, 6801.1, supportive cluster around, 6670, upside vol selling, 6860, centroid L, 6836.23, centroid H, 6841.98, upside pivot, 6927.53, upside target, 6986.74, downside pivot, 6763.18, downside target, 6669.73, vomma supply Low +- 20.58, 6762.75, upside vol selling +- 20.58, 6978.02, VOL H, 6928.86, VOL H+, 6957.14, VOL L, 6811.94, VOL L+, 6783.66
